NAVAREA XIX 120/24
 ANDOEYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT ACTIVITY IN THE PERIOD FROM THE 16.SEP TO 06.OCT 24 DAILY FROM 16:00-02:00 UTC.
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREA:

 A. 69-39.00N 014-03.00E
 B. 69-16.10N 013-12.70E
 C. 69-09.00N 014-24.00E
 D. 69-09.00N 015-10.00E
 E. 69-12.10N 015-34.50E
 F. 69-19.10N 016-03.20E
 G. 69-10.50N 016-08.30E
 H. 69-16.00N 016-41.00E
 I. 69-37.90N 017-23.00E
 J. 70-01.10N 016-34.50E
 K. 70-24.30N 015-48.70E
 L. 70-11.70N 015-19.60E
 M. 69-39.00N 014-03.00E

 FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON:
 TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 (CALLSIGN RANGE SAFETY)
